title: Garlicky Zesty Moroccan Lamb Tagine
description: A show-stopping Moroccan dish featuring lamb, aromatics, and spices, served over crispy iceberg lettuce, steamed to perfection.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the lamb shoulder and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, garlic, ginger, cumin, cinnamon, sweet paprika, and salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are softened, about 5 minutes.
Add 2 cups of water to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the oven. Bake at 300°F for 90 minutes, or until the lamb is tender.
While the lamb is cooking, prepare the iceberg lettuce by washing and drying it. Cut it into thin strips and place on a serving platter.
To serve, place a portion of the lamb and sauce over the lettuce and garnish with fresh parsley.
